title: oxalis grayi
intro: Oxalis grayi, also known as the false sorrel, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the wood sorrel family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Oxalis grayi include treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and stomach ulcers, as well as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. The herbal preparation of Oxalis grayi can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
